name: Zucchini Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting I
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat sugar, oil, and eggs at medium speed in an electric mixer bowl for 4 minutes.
2. Sift flour with baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Fold zucchini and nuts into the sugar mixture.
3. Fold in the flour mixture and vanilla, blending thoroughly.
4. Turn the batter into a well-greased 10-inch tube pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 65 minutes.
6. Cool in the pan on a rack for 15 minutes or longer.
7. Remove from the pan and cool the cake thoroughly on a rack.
To make frosting:
1. Beat powdered sugar, cream cheese (or butter), and lemon extract until thoroughly blended.
2. Spread over the cooled cake.
